title: Websites + ACME SSL (nginx-only, HTTP-01 + Cloudflare DNS-01)

openQuestions: Q1 — nginx in Docker (reuse v0.2 infra) vs host systemd? (claude lean: host systemd)
Q2 — Config storage: live confs only vs SQLite mirror? (claude lean: live conf + metadata DB)
Q3 — ACME library: acme-client / certbot / lego? (claude lean: acme-client Node)
Q4 — Site directory layout (/www/sites/<name>/ vs /opt/dinopanel/sites/<name>/ vs /var/www/<name>/)? (claude lean: /opt/dinopanel/sites/<name>/)
Q5 — TLS auto-renewal: ad-hoc scheduler now or wait for v0.5 cron module? (claude lean: in-process setInterval, fold into v0.5)
